---
title: "AuraLayers.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\AuraLayers.tsx"
loc: 100
complexity: 7
logic_score: 7.75
style_score: 4.04
intel_score: 4.00
overall_score: 3.50
---

## Intent
The `AuraLayers.tsx` sector implements modular logic focusing on GungnirAuraMaterial, FresnelAura, FresnelAura, materialRef, isToxic, isExcellence, gravity, scale, base, color, intensity, pulseSpeed, SelectionHighlight, SelectionHighlight, meshRef, s. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via GungnirAuraMaterial, FresnelAura, FresnelAura, materialRef, isToxic, isExcellence, gravity, scale, base, color, intensity, pulseSpeed, SelectionHighlight, SelectionHighlight, meshRef, s. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useRef](file://react)
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [extend](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [ThreeElement](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [shaderMaterial](file://@react-three/drei)
- [Node](file://../types/index.js)
- [useMatrixStore](file://../store/useMatrixStore.js)

### Exports
- `GungnirAuraMaterial`
- `FresnelAura`
- `FresnelAura`
- `materialRef`
- `isToxic`
- `isExcellence`
- `gravity`
- `scale`
- `base`
- `color`
- `intensity`
- `pulseSpeed`
- `SelectionHighlight`
- `SelectionHighlight`
- `meshRef`
- `s`
